summary: The provided data lists faculty members and the subjects they teach. To identify subjects with no student attendance, we would need additional data on student enrollment for each subject.
sql_debug:
SELECT u.name AS faculty_name, fa.subject_name, fa.subject_code
FROM faculty_assignments fa
JOIN users u ON fa.teacher_id = u.id
WHERE fa.is_deleted = false AND fa.college_id = current_setting('app.college_id') AND u.is_deleted = false
AND NOT EXISTS (
  SELECT 1
  FROM attendance_records ar
  WHERE ar.subject_code = fa.subject_code
  AND ar.college_id = fa.college_id
  AND ar.is_deleted = false
)
ORDER BY u.name, fa.subject_name
